'''Polos''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core's]] [[Beshqek system]]. It occupied the third [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Beshqek]] and had one [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Polos featured a rocky surface and a [[Poison/Legends|toxic]] environment.<ref name="Wizards" />

==Behind the scenes==
Polos was first mentioned in "[[Byss and the Deep Core]], Part 1: Byss," the first entry in the [[Planet Hoppers]] ''[[Byss and the Deep Core]]'' article series, written by [[Rodney Thompson]] and published on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Wizards.com|website]] on [[April 14]], [[2005]].<ref name="Wizards" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the world in grid square K-11.<ref name="TEA" />
